input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.9.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.9.1
            TITLE: activation sequence

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.9.1: Activation Sequence
EV.9.1 Activation Sequence 
The vehicle systems must energize in the following sequence: 
a. Low Voltage (GLV) System  EV.9.2 
b. Tractive System Active  EV.9.3 
c. Ready to Drive  EV.9.4

final_answer: rule EV.9.1: Activation Sequence The vehicle systems must energize in the following sequence: a. Low Voltage (GLV) System EV.9.2 b. Tractive System Active EV.9.3 c. Ready to Drive EV.9.4
